escalation.rationale: US-Iran ceasefire appears fragile with continued Israeli strikes on Lebanon and Iran's control over Strait of Hormuz creating ongoing tensions.

ticker_items: Iran blocks Strait of Hormuz as two-week US ceasefire takes effect
Israeli airstrikes continue in Lebanon despite ceasefire agreement
Iran strikes Saudi Arabia's East-West oil pipeline with drones
Pakistan hosts crucial US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad
Russia launches spring offensive with 400 drone assault on Ukraine

eastern_europe.description: Russian spring offensive continues with massive drone and missile barrage on civilian areas.
Russia launched nearly 400 drones and multiple missiles in major assault on civilian areas.

middle_east.description: Iranian drone strike hits Saudi Arabia's East-West oil pipeline pumping station.
Israel launches largest assault on Lebanon since invasion began, targeting Hezbollah positions.
Drone strike on Kuwaiti territory, Kuwait blames Iran and proxies.
Israeli forces conducted massive bombardment killing at least 250 people in heaviest attack since war began.
Iranian drone struck pumping station on Saudi Arabia's East-West oil pipeline.
IDF struck and killed Hezbollah commander Maher Qassem Hamdan and eight militants in Chebaa area.
Iranian drone attacked pumping station along Saudi Arabia's 1,200 km East-West oil pipeline.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths
US soldiers killed in Iran conflict

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: Remember Greenland, that big, poorly run, piece of ice!!!
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Any ceasefire agreement to halt fighting between Tehran and Washington must explicitly include an end to Israeli military attacks in Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Ministry

middle_east.text: NATO wasn't there when we needed them
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Ceasefire violations carry explicit costs and strong responses
middle_east.speaker: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf
middle_east.title: Iran Parliament Speaker

middle_east.text: The military will be hanging around in Iran, won't go anywhere
middle_east.speaker: Pete Hegseth
middle_east.title: US Defense Secretary

middle_east.text: Iran will seek retribution for attacks on the country and is resolute in taking revenge for its late supreme leader
middle_east.speaker: Mojataba Ali Khamenei
middle_east.title: Supreme Leader of Iran

middle_east.text: There is no ceasefire - Israeli strikes have continued against Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Jessica Tarlov
middle_east.title: Fox News Host

observers.description: Ukrainian covert forces operating in western Libya under Western-endorsed deal used Libyan territory to strike Russian tanker in Mediterranean. Two Libyan officials confirmed the arrangement allowing Ukrainian operations from their soil.

Mitsui OSK Lines monitoring US-Iran ceasefire implementation before allowing vessels through Strait of Hormuz. Major shipping company taking cautious approach to testing strategic waterway amid fragile truce.
Pakistan successfully brokered the two-week US-Iran ceasefire agreement announced April 7. Islamabad is now hosting the first direct US-Iran peace talks as Israeli attacks threaten the fragile truce.

Norwegian military forces joined UK-led operation to deter Russian submarines in North Atlantic. Reports suggest Norway is also providing specialists to Ukraine for potential maritime sabotage operations against Russian vessels.

UK military exposed covert Russian submarine operations in British waters, forcing vessels to retreat. British and Norwegian forces conducted weeks-long deterrent operation against Russian submarines suspected of malign activity in North Atlantic.

Chancellor Friedrich Merz told President Trump that Germany would back a mission to secure sea lanes in the Strait of Hormuz. However, Germany insists it would first need an international UN mandate before participating in any such operation.

Spain is moving to reopen its embassy in Tehran following the US-Iran ceasefire agreement. The diplomatic move comes as Trump has been critical of NATO allies' reluctance to join the war effort against Iran.

financial.notes: Iran's control over Strait of Hormuz is impacting global energy markets despite ceasefire.

update_log.text: Pakistan confirms hosting US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad with tight security measures
Germany offers support for Hormuz mission but demands UN mandate first
Iran strikes Saudi oil pipeline infrastructure with drone attack
Israeli airstrikes continue in southern Lebanon targeting Hezbollah positions
Analysis shows fragile US-Iran ceasefire threatened by Israeli strikes killing 250+ in Lebanon
Iran threatens to abort ceasefire if Israel continues Lebanon attacks
Trump reportedly discussed leaving NATO after closed-door meeting
UK and Norway completed operation deterring Russian submarines in North Atlantic
Kuwait blames Iran for overnight drone strike, Iran denies responsibility
Israel launches largest Lebanon assault since invasion began, 254 killed in single day
Trump criticizes NATO over Iran war after closed-door meeting with Secretary General Rutte
Iranian drone reportedly strikes Saudi East-West oil pipeline pumping station
